notes: v0.2 wraps the v0.1 per-building-type libraries into a graph-native Program Database format.
Adjacency edges are stored as weighted edges with relationship enums suitable for bubble diagram solvers.
Benchmarks in v0.2 are templates/placeholders to be populated with verified data (EUI, cost, parking).
Calibration hooks are included for importing and normalizing your firm's project schedules.
v0.2 adds 15 new building-type databases and updates the master index to point to corrected Multifamily and Fire Station variants.
Some newly added building types intentionally omit uncertain or operator-specific metrics and should be backfilled later with validated project or standards data.
v0.2 adds shared_baselines referencing program_database_code_baseline.json for shared code/standard source profiles.

space_type_taxonomy_notes: space_id is a stable canonical identifier (e.g., OFF_OPEN_WORK).
raw_name is the original room name from your project export.
map raw_name -> space_id; store confidence and notes.
